privileged_info_summary: The task requires the agent to build a PsychoPy experiment from scratch, generating its own components and data. The target experiment file is /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/retrocue/retrocue_task.psyexp, supported by a conditions file at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/retrocue/conditions.csv, and data should be saved to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/retrocue/data. The conditions file must contain the columns left_color, right_color, cue_dir, probe_color, and corr_resp. The experiment must include the routines encoding, delay1, cue, delay2, and probe.
